title: The Maltese Falcon
author: Dashiell Hammett
blurb: Forget the idiot Fitzgeralds — for a real writer power couple, look instead to Dashiell Hammett and Lillian Hellman. The former gave us noir, the latter gave us The North Star, and both gave us lots and lots of HUAC fun.
blurb2: Humphrey Bogart is a big fat liar. He lied to Katharine Hepburn, he lied to Walter Huston, and he's lying still to this day (to all of us) about Sam Spade's hair color. (It's meant to be blond, damn it.)
